title: melilotus infestus
intro: Melilotus infestus, also known as French or common melilot, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and compound leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, due to the presence of isoflavones and coumarins. The health benefits of Melilotus infestus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Melilotus infestus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat a range of ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
